tasks.label: Compose Dev Up
tasks.command: docker compose --profile dev down --remove-orphans && docker compose --profile dev up -d --build && timeout 600 bash -c 'until docker compose --profile dev logs backend-dev --tail 200 | grep -q "Listening for transport dt_socket at address: 5005"; do sleep 1; done'

tasks.label: Compose Backend Restart
tasks.command: docker compose --profile dev up -d --build backend-dev && timeout 600 bash -c 'until docker compose --profile dev logs backend-dev --tail 200 | grep -q "Listening for transport dt_socket at address: 5005"; do sleep 1; done'
